introSection: Little Dipper Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Scandia Amusement Park in Lake George, New York, USA.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and supports, used to be red track and supports.

fullText:
Little Dipper Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Scandia Amusement Park in Lake George, New York, USA.



Blue track and supports, used to be red track and supports.
